_comment: AUTO-GENERATED: This schema was generated from the receiverSettingsSchema valibot schema in util/receiverSettings.ts. Do not edit manually.

audioDelay.description:
Allows you to associate other "Powered by HEOS" devices to the Marantz Model M1 in order to listen to listen to the TV in other rooms.

In case of an echo, it is possible to reduce the delay between the Marantz Model M1 and the other devices to improve the synchronization and audio playback.

Warning: too short of a delay may cause audio to drop as network performance degrades. If you experience drops, increase the delay.

balance.description: Biases towards the left speaker (negative values) or towards the right speaker (positive values).

dialogueEnhancement.description: Adjusts how much loud dialogue is relative to other sounds

digitalFilter.description: Apply different audio filters for different tonal profiles.

highPassFilter.description: Filter above which the left and right speakers will be active.

lowPassFilter.description: Filter below which the subwoofer will be active.

multiRoomAudioQuality.description:
Choose how to distribute high-bitrate audio sources such as WAV or PCM (including audio from external inputs) when playing in multi-room groups.

Normal: high bitrate audio is compressed in AAC 256 kbps before being distributed to other rooms. This improves reliability and network performance.

High: high bitrate audio is sent in PCM 16 bits 44.1 kHz non-compressed to other rooms. Do not use this option unless your devices are connected via ethernet or if all grouped devices are using an excellent wifi signal.

nightMode.description: When enabled, reduces the dynamic range of output audio to achieve a homogeneous loudness level.

outputMode.description: Determines whether audio will be split into two channels or duplicated by each speaker.

soundMode.description:
Choose how to process sound.

Direct: bypass processing Stereo: downmix to two channel audio (plus subwoofer) Virtual: simulated 5.1 audio

statusLedBrightness.description: Adjust the front status LED brightness.

touchControls.description: Touch controls on the front of the device. Can be off, on, or on and with sounds as feedback.

tvAutoplay.description: Determines whether TV audio source will be switched to by default once active.

tvInput.description: Determines which source to use as audio for the TV.

tvRemoteCodes.description: When active, this device responds to the most commonly used IR volume commands from the TV remote without having to learn the IR codes for your particular TV.

volumeLimit.description: Limiting volume can protect speakers if volume levels exceed the power capabilities of your speakers.
